title: Phyllarthron articulatum
taxonomy: Phyllarthron articulatum is classified within the family Icacinaceae. This family comprises a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The species Phyllarthron articulatum is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Phyllarthron articulatum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the Icacinaceae family. Further study is needed to fully understand the taxonomic position of Phyllarthron articulatum within its broader botanical context.
